description.en: When passed a valid media configuration, it returns a promise with information as to whether the media type is supported, and whether encoding such media would be smooth and power efficient.

excerpt.es: When passed a valid media configuration, it returns a promise with information as to whether the media type is supported, and whether encoding such media would be smooth and power efficient.
